perturbation.original_text: All Evaluation Material (i) shall be used solely for the purpose of evaluating and considering the Transaction; (ii) shall be kept strictly confidential by the Receiving Party; and (iii) shall be provided by the Receiving Party solely to those of its Representatives to whom disclosure is reasonably required to facilitate the Receiving Party's evaluation or consideration of the Transaction, it being the intention of the Parties to restrict the dissemination of Evaluation Material to as small a working group as practicable.
perturbation.changed_text: All Evaluation Material (i) may be used for purposes beyond evaluating and considering the Transaction; (ii) shall be kept strictly confidential by the Receiving Party; and (iii) shall be provided by the Receiving Party to any of its Representatives, regardless of their involvement in the Transaction, as the Receiving Party deems appropriate.
perturbation.explanation: This change alters the restrictions on the use and dissemination of Evaluation Material. The original text restricts use to evaluating the Transaction and limits disclosure to a small working group, while the modified text allows broader use and dissemination. This directly contradicts the purpose defined in Section 1, where it states that the agreement is made so that all Evaluation Material shall be treated according to this agreement, but the change makes the usage purpose to be beyond that which was originally defined.
perturbation.contradicted_text: EarthLink and PeoplePC wish to have discussions relating to a potential transaction (the "Transaction" ) between EarthLink (and/or its subsidiaries and stockholders) and PeoplePC (and/or its subsidiaries and stockholders). In the course of such discussions, each Party expects to make available to the other Party and its Representatives (as defined herein) Evaluation Material (as defined herein) concerning the businesses, financial condition, operations, assets, properties, liabilities, and prospects of such Party. As a condition to making such information available, each Party is entering this Agreement and agrees that all Evaluation Material received by it or its Representatives from the other Party or any of its Representatives shall be treated in accordance with this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text strictly limited the use and dissemination of Evaluation Material to evaluating the Transaction and a small working group. The changed text broadens the use to purposes beyond the Transaction and allows dissemination to any Representatives, regardless of involvement. This directly contradicts the Contradicted Text, which states that all Evaluation Material shall be treated in accordance with this Agreement and implies a restricted use for the specific purpose of the Transaction discussions. The change introduces an inconsistency, as defined in the Perturbation Definitions, making the agreement unclear and potentially unenforceable.

perturbation.original_text: In the event that either Party should institute proceedings to enforce any provision of this Agreement, the prevailing Party in such proceedings shall be entitled to recover all expenses relating to the enforcement of this Agreement, including reasonable attorneys' fees and costs, in addition to any other remedies.
perturbation.changed_text: In the event that either Party should institute proceedings to enforce any provision of this Agreement, each Party shall bear its own expenses relating to the enforcement of this Agreement, including attorneys' fees and costs.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by reversing the provision for attorneys' fees. The original text allows the prevailing party to recover expenses, while the modified text requires each party to bear its own costs. This contradiction creates uncertainty about the financial consequences of litigation.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Remedies. Each Party agrees that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of any provision of this Agreement by it or any of its Representatives, and that in addition to all other remedies which either Party may have, each Party shall be entitled to specific performance and injunctive or other equitable relief as a remedy for any such breach. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Agreement but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or in equity. No failure or delay by either Party in exercising any right, power or privilege hereunder shall operate as a waiver thereof, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or further exercise thereof or the exercise of any right, power or privilege hereunder. In the event that either Party should institute proceedings to enforce any provision of this Agreement, each Party shall bear its own expenses relating to the enforcement of this Agreement, including attorneys' fees and costs.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that 'each Party shall bear its own expenses relating to the enforcement of this Agreement, including attorneys' fees and costs,' while the contradicted text includes the exact same sentence. This directly contradicts the original text's statement that 'the prevailing Party in such proceedings shall be entitled to recover all expenses relating to the enforcement of this Agreement, including reasonable attorneys' fees and costs.' This is a clear in-text contradiction related to inconsistencies as defined in the prompt.
